title: Garden Vida Memphis Kettle BBQ Grill Freestanding Barbecue Garden Outdoor Portable Picnic Party Camping Red & Black
features: Chrome Plated Grill: Garden Vida Memphis freestanding BBQ grill features a 43.5 cm wide chrome plated, temperature resistant, hard wearing and easy to clean cooking grill providing you with a lot of cooking space.

Compact Design: Its compact size and makes it ideal for summer parties in your garden with friends and family or for taking with you on holidays or a day trip out. When not in use, the BBQ can be stored in your shed, garage or any storage areas without taking too much space.

Lid with air inlet: The kettle design distributes heat more evenly and when the lid is placed on the grill it prevents flare-ups from dripping grease and allows heat to circulate around the food as it cooks. The air flow vent allows you to control the cooking temperature to cook the perfect meal.
Charcoal Tray: Features a silver charcoal/ash tray at the bottom to prevent coal or ash from falling on the ground - It also reduces the cleaning work afterwards.
Storage Shelf: A convenient lower shelf acts as a storage rack, ideal for placing hot tongs, spatulas and other cooking accessories.
description: Product Description Garden Vida Memphis Freestanding Kettle Grill BBQ, Red & Black Enjoy the perfect barbeque this summer with this Memphis Freestanding Kettle Grill BBQ, Red & Black. Made from strong and durable iron, this outdoor BBQ has been built to last and withstand up 400°C to keep a constant cooking temperature when cooking. Offering plenty of space to cook burgers, sizzling sausages, skewer and vegetables, ideal for garden gatherings, summer parties with your friends and family or taking it with you on holidays. With 2 weather resistant wheels, it's easy to move around the garden and it's easy-to-assemble, you will be grilling in no time at all and with the help of the built in ventilation dial, you control the heat to cook the perfect meal. Key Features Portable Controlled Air Ventilation Simple Assembly Heat Resistant Durable Anti-Slip Product Specifications Cooking Grate Chrome platted steel cooking grate Charcoal Grate Heavy-gauge steel fuel grate Material Porcelain-enameled bowl and lid Handle Lid handle with heat sheild Colour Red & Black Dimensions H 84 x W 53 x D 45.5 cm Lid With Vents The Memphis freestanding BBQ comes with an air ventilated lid. This allows people to cook food at a perfect temperature ensuring they get the best tasting food. The lid also comes with a handle, meaning the chances of you getting burnt remain minimal. Cooking Grate The cooking grate that comes with the BBQ means you have more than enough space to cook your favourite foods all at once. It remains a safe distance away from the charcoal, giving it the best possible chance to cook all of the delicious foods you love. Wheels By having 2 wheels our BBQ allows you to take it with you wherever you want. Whether you are wanting to go camping or have a family and friends meal in the garden. By having the wheels attached this is then much easier to do. Charcoal Tray The charcoal/ash tray attached just under the grill means that cleaning up afterwards has never been easier. This feature makes sure that any ash falling from the grill goes straight onto the tray and does not cause any mess whatsoever.
